steps.title: Mark a second method
steps.content: The first sentence gives one way to handle contaminated soil: remove it and put it in a landfill. The second sentence gives a different method: detoxifying it through phytoremediation.

steps.title: Choose a contrastive transition
steps.content: B would introduce a more specific version of the landfill method, which phytoremediation is not. C would present an example of the first method. D would make the second method a result of landfill disposal. The answer is A.
